---
title: 'The Interview... Gone Wild!!!!'
date: '2014-12-18T04:53:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1578335330738052083'
blogger_filename: '/2014/12/the-interview-gone-wild.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News Events'
---

<p dir=ltr>After hearing about North Korea's attack, I got to thinking how tired I am of dictators like the Kim Jong's, Putin, or Obama... People that are always trying to get the masses to comply to their will or be afraid of being outspoken...</p><p dir=ltr>Here's what I would be tempted to do if I were @<a href="https://mobile.twitter.com/sonypictures">SonyPictures</a> or @<a href="https://mobile.twitter.com/sethrogen">Seth</a><a href="https://mobile.twitter.com/sethrogen">Rogen</a>, I'd just send the movie via mp4 to every known email address in the world I could get my hands on with a message to pass it around. </p><p dir=ltr>Take that Dictatorships of the world!</p><p dir=ltr>Or not...</p><p dir=ltr>Maybe I wouldn't...</p><p dir=ltr>Or would I?</p><p dir=ltr>I didn't make the movie, so I don't get to make that call. I guess we'll never know. </p><p dir=ltr>Come on Sony... Do it... Do it... I DARE you!! </p><p dir=ltr>DarrellWolfe</p>
